title: Mathematics Honours (Extended1)

prerequisites.text: (i) 60% or higher for MAM3000W; and (ii) the average of the four marks for MAM1000W, MAM1019H, MAM2000W and MAM3000W should be 60% or higher. Acceptance subject to individual approval by the Head of Department. Students are not allowed to repeat this course.

outline: This course, together with MAM4110W and MAM4014W, covers the content of MAM4000W over two years. Students do two core modules in the first semester and two more modules in the second semester (total 80 credits).
